channel.title: Unschool Pages of Our Lives
channel.description: Follow a family deeply rooted in unschooling as they share heartwarming stories, daily adventures, and candid discussions that inspire all ages to embrace the freedom of learning through life's experiences.
channel.author: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
channel.copyright: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
channel.itunes:author: KIDO Family Ranch
channel.itunes:summary: Follow a family deeply rooted in unschooling as they share heartwarming stories, daily adventures, and candid discussions that inspire all ages to embrace the freedom of learning through life's experiences.

item.title: Tornado Tales: Sheltering in Place and Staying Safe
item.description:
Signs of a tornado appear, and the KIDO Family gets ready to shelter in place. There’s no panic, but hints of stress and wonder are in the air. The children ask their mommy if they’re safe from nature’s might, or if they’ll come face to face with a tornado tonight.
I’m sure you’ve noticed storms gathering force, making us suspect someone, somewhere, is giving Earth a makeover this year. We’ve experienced weather like never before: snowstorms, earthquakes, wildfires, hail, mud from heavy rains, and dust from harmattans. Flooding in some places, tornadoes blowing through others.
But today, things got real! A wall of clouds covered our nature view, and our phone alarms wailed. We gathered our boots to bring you the story about being tornado-proof.
In this episode, we discuss what we’ve learned about tornadoes, sheltering in place, the Enhanced Fujita Scale, and following storm chaser trails. We’re safe, with our shoes, sweaters, and some games, sitting in the closet and sharing the knowledge we’ve gained.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary:
Signs of a tornado appear, and the KIDO Family gets ready to shelter in place. There’s no panic, but hints of stress and wonder are in the air. The children ask their mommy if they’re safe from nature’s might, or if they’ll come face to face with a tornado tonight.
I’m sure you’ve noticed storms gathering force, making us suspect someone, somewhere, is giving Earth a makeover this year. We’ve experienced weather like never before: snowstorms, earthquakes, wildfires, hail, mud from heavy rains, and dust from harmattans. Flooding in some places, tornadoes blowing through others.
But today, things got real! A wall of clouds covered our nature view, and our phone alarms wailed. We gathered our boots to bring you the story about being tornado-proof.
In this episode, we discuss what we’ve learned about tornadoes, sheltering in place, the Enhanced Fujita Scale, and following storm chaser trails. We’re safe, with our shoes, sweaters, and some games, sitting in the closet and sharing the knowledge we’ve gained.
Photo & Video Credits
Video, graphic design, and audio by Danii Oliver: https://daniioliver.com
Video by Coverr from Pexels: https://www.pexels.com/video/footage-of-tornado-853833/
Photo by Manfred Langpap: https://www.pexels.com/photo/lightning-in-dark-sky-in-countryside-16114057/
Photo by Kat Smith: https://www.pexels.com/photo/brown-bare-tree-551615/
Photo by Moritz Böing: https://www.pexels.com/photo/cloudy-sky-846980/
Photo by Anton Kudryashov: https://www.pexels.com/photo/a-lightning-in-the-sky-9861936/
Photo by Apoorv Ishan: https://www.pexels.com/photo/car-window-panel-with-water-droplets-1046397/
Photo by Pixabay: https://www.pexels.com/photo/white-and-yellow-cloudy-sky-over-farm-lands-69400/
Photo by Pixabay: https://www.pexels.com/photo/grass-field-below-clouds-355441/

item.title: Field Trip to the Fort Worth Water Gardens
item.description: Join us for an exciting field trip episode as we visit the Fort Worth Water Gardens! This special outing offers a refreshing escape into one of Texas' most stunning architectural and ecological sites. Listen in as we explore the serene water features, delve into the garden's design, and discover the educational aspects of this urban oasis. Whether you're a nature enthusiast, architecture aficionado, or just looking for a peaceful break from the everyday, this episode is sure to captivate and educate. Don't miss this unique journey with the Unschool Pages of Our Lives podcast!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Join us for an exciting field trip episode as we visit the Fort Worth Water Gardens! This special outing offers a refreshing escape into one of Texas' most stunning architectural and ecological sites. Listen in as we explore the serene water features, delve into the garden's design, and discover the educational aspects of this urban oasis. Whether you're a nature enthusiast, architecture aficionado, or just looking for a peaceful break from the everyday, this episode is sure to captivate and educate. Don't miss this unique journey with the Unschool Pages of Our Lives podcast!

item.title: Storytime: Suspended Part 2 The Best Thing Ever
item.description:
It’s Storytime! Join us on an exciting journey with Jeremy, a young boy whose suspension from school turned into the best thing ever.
Dive into his story of exploration and discovery as he embraces the unschooling lifestyle. From flying airplanes to learning about dinosaurs and cooking with his dad, Jeremy’s adventure is a testament to the endless possibilities of self-directed learning.
Get inspired to unleash your own potential in this episode of Unschool Pages of Our Lives!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary:
It’s Storytime! Join us on an exciting journey with Jeremy, a young boy whose suspension from school turned into the best thing ever.
Dive into his story of exploration and discovery as he embraces the unschooling lifestyle. From flying airplanes to learning about dinosaurs and cooking with his dad, Jeremy’s adventure is a testament to the endless possibilities of self-directed learning.
Get inspired to unleash your own potential in this episode of Unschool Pages of Our Lives!

item.title: Suspended: What If It's the Best Thing Ever?
item.description:
Imagine a world where getting suspended from school opens the door to a whole new way of learning. In this episode, we dive into the realm of unschooling, where freedom and curiosity replace traditional classrooms.
Join us as we explore how a suspension could be a hidden opportunity to discover the wonders of atoms, dinosaurs, trees, and peacocks. It’s time to question the status quo and consider: What if getting suspended from school was the best thing ever?
Let’s embark on this thought-provoking journey together.
Dive into a lively discussion on the benefits of unschooling, where freedom and curiosity lead the way. Join us as we debunk myths about atoms, marvel at prehistoric creatures, and uncover the wonders of nature, from the vibrant colors of peacocks to the fascinating world of trees.
Whether you’re suspended from school or simply seeking a different path to learning, this episode is a journey into the heart of unschooling and the endless possibilities it offers.
Teaser:
Join us on an exciting journey with Jeremy, a young boy whose suspension from school turned into the best thing ever.
Dive into his story of exploration and discovery as he embraces the unschooling lifestyle. From flying airplanes to learning about dinosaurs and cooking with his dad, Jeremy’s adventure is a testament to the endless possibilities of self-directed learning.
Get inspired to unleash your own potential in this episode of Unschool Pages of Our Lives!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary:
Imagine a world where getting suspended from school opens the door to a whole new way of learning. In this episode, we dive into the realm of unschooling, where freedom and curiosity replace traditional classrooms.
Join us as we explore how a suspension could be a hidden opportunity to discover the wonders of atoms, dinosaurs, trees, and peacocks. It’s time to question the status quo and consider: What if getting suspended from school was the best thing ever?
Let’s embark on this thought-provoking journey together.
Dive into a lively discussion on the benefits of unschooling, where freedom and curiosity lead the way. Join us as we debunk myths about atoms, marvel at prehistoric creatures, and uncover the wonders of nature, from the vibrant colors of peacocks to the fascinating world of trees.
Whether you’re suspended from school or simply seeking a different path to learning, this episode is a journey into the heart of unschooling and the endless possibilities it offers.
Teaser:
Join us on an exciting journey with Jeremy, a young boy whose suspension from school turned into the best thing ever.
Dive into his story of exploration and discovery as he embraces the unschooling lifestyle. From flying airplanes to learning about dinosaurs and cooking with his dad, Jeremy’s adventure is a testament to the endless possibilities of self-directed learning.
Get inspired to unleash your own potential in this episode of Unschool Pages of Our Lives!

item.title: Unschooler Ask Experts Questions: Annie Tassani Smith
item.description:
We ask Expert natural learning Author and momma Annie Tassani Smith some serious unschool questions that get to the core of our shared genre bending narratives the bridge both fiction and non-fiction memoir literary buckets. We talk about questions we had from the book, go on shared unschool lifestyle tangents and connect on lived experiences we not onlt capture in our books but also have in common even from miles and miles apart.


Dive into "We ARE at School" by Annie Tassani Smith
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary:
We ask Expert natural learning Author and momma Annie Tassani Smith some serious unschool questions that get to the core of our shared genre bending narratives the bridge both fiction and non-fiction memoir literary buckets. We talk about questions we had from the book, go on shared unschool lifestyle tangents and connect on lived experiences we not onlt capture in our books but also have in common even from miles and miles apart.


Dive into "We ARE at School" by Annie Tassani Smith

item.title: Storytime: We ARE at School Read Aloud
item.description: Join us for a special storytime episode as we dive into the heart-centered world of 'We ARE at School' by Annie Tassani Smith. Experience the relaxed flow of a homeschool life through this captivating read-aloud, perfect for young listeners and their families who are curious about homeschool or unschooling. Get cozy and let your imagination roam as we explore the adventures and joys of homeschool. Don't miss this delightful journey on 'Unschool Pages of Our Lives'!" For more information, visit the author's page for "We ARE at School" by Annie Tassani Smith here: https://pancakesandsnuggles.com
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Join us for a special storytime episode as we dive into the heart-centered world of 'We ARE at School' by Annie Tassani Smith. Experience the relaxed flow of a homeschool life through this captivating read-aloud, perfect for young listeners and their families who are curious about homeschool or unschooling. Get cozy and let your imagination roam as we explore the adventures and joys of homeschool. Don't miss this delightful journey on 'Unschool Pages of Our Lives'!" For more information, visit the author's page for "We ARE at School" by Annie Tassani Smith here: https://pancakesandsnuggles.com

item.title: Unleashing Creativity: Making Movies & Music as Unschoolers
item.description: Dance, stomp, clap, and sing into the world of improv music-making with us in this beat-making, songwriting episode! We'll explore the boundless creativity of making music, from using body noises to banging on objects. Hear a story about crafting tunes from everyday sounds and discover how unschooling frees you to spend endless hours appreciating and creating music. Join us for a symphony of fun and inspiration as we celebrate the joy of musical exploration on "Unschool Pages of Our Lives"!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: This episode celebrates musical creativity and improv, showing how unschooling encourages exploring, composing, and making music from everyday sounds in a fun and inspiring way.

item.title: Season Trailer
item.description: Listen to Unschool Pages of Our Lives on your favorite podcast platform. In the car on the go or as a lunch and learn with the kiddos. We're showcasing what UNSCHOOLING can look like and sound like. There's lots of questions, lots of noise and lots of curiosity.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Listen to Unschool Pages of Our Lives on your favorite podcast platform. In the car on the go or as a lunch and learn with the kiddos. We're showcasing what UNSCHOOLING can look like and sound like. Theres lots of questions, lots of noise and lots of curiosity.

item.title: MardiGras & Carnival Examined By Unschoolers
item.description:
We just ended Caribbean Carnival season or Mardi Gras season, and this episode is packed with Carnival facts. From Mardi Gras in Louisiana to the mockery of Carnival, we're talking about the babies and the cakes, things being thrown, costumes, music, dance, street celebrations, and even throwing coconuts. Learn how steel pans are made and how people stand up to show pride for who they are. This episode is packed with fun facts, serious facts, and lots of celebration. Sit back, relax, and enjoy this episode of "Mardi Gras and Carnival, Examined by Unschoolers."
Grab a signed copy of our book: "Unschool Discoveries: Venturing into the Unknown" https://kidofamilyranchpublishing.square.site/
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: This episode explores Mardi Gras and Carnival traditions, examining our cultural celebrations, their significance, history, and the joy they bring to communities around the world.

item.title: Swamp Biomes Unearthed - A Mardi Gras Wildlife Adventure
item.description:
Crawfish or Crayfish? It's Mardi Gras season, and we're headed to the Bayous and swampland biomes of Louisiana to uncover the animals that live within the low-lying marshy, wetland creeks—where fish and plankton thrive! We discover how the Ankylosaurus survived to become Alligator Snapping Turtles. We visit the kings of this planet, genus Panthera, paying respect to their apex-ness. We uncover boars, eagles, swamp rats, and red-bellied piranha. When we started the journey, we knew there were frogs, but Dino Robot thought all there were were small creatures—wow, were they in for a surprise! Join us on this wild ride as we uncover the mysteries of swamp biomes and what humans might taste like to an alligator from Miss Animalia. All this and more on this Swamp Biomes Unearthed—A Mardi Gras Wildlife Adventure episode of Unschool Pages of Our Lives.
Grab a signed copy of our book: "Unschool Discoveries: Venturing into the Unknown" by Danii Oliver https://kidofamilyranchpublishing.square.site/
Follow Us: Newsletter: https://open.substack.com/pub/unschoolpages/p/unschool-pages-a-podcast-haven-for?r=2sj9am&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: This episode explores Louisiana's swamp biomes during Mardi Gras, uncovering the unique wildlife, surprising creatures, and fascinating adaptations in a wild and educational adventure.

item.title: Minecraft Explored: Biomes, Mobs, and More - Part 2
item.description:
This is Part 2 of our Minecraft week, and we're diving into scandalous research about the pixelated world of Minecraft's diverse biomes and terrifying mobs! This episode uncovers fascinating insights into virtual Minecraft ecosystems, explores the quirks and features of different mobs, and shares tips and tricks even pro players might not know. Whether you're a Minecraft newbie or a crafting expert, there's always something new to learn. So, pick up your pickaxe and start digging into the rich, creative realms of Minecraft together!
Grab a signed copy of our book:"Unschool Discoveries: Venturing into the Unknown" by Danii Oliver https://kidofamilyranchpublishing.square.site/
Follow Us: Newsletter: https://open.substack.com/pub/unschoolpages/p/unschool-pages-a-podcast-haven-for?r=2sj9am&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: This episode explores Minecraft's diverse biomes and mobs, sharing insights, quirks, and pro-level tips for players of all skill levels in a fun and educational adventure.

item.title: Minecraft Discovery Engagement Week!
item.description:
Today we have a very different episode from anything that we've done in the past. It's not reading day, and we're not necessarily going to go into our new podcast segment structure. We're just going to explore Minecraft today. It's gaming week here at the KIDO Family Ranch, and we've decided the game we're going to play is Minecraft, because it allows me to be creative and build things, as well as face a little struggle in survival mode. Coming up next, the kids are going to teach me how to play Minecraft!
Grab a signed copy of our book:"Unschool Discoveries: Venturing into the Unknown" by Danii Oliver https://kidofamilyranchpublishing.square.site/
Follow Us: Newsletter: https://open.substack.com/pub/unschoolpages/p/unschool-pages-a-podcast-haven-for?r=2sj9am&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: This episode kicks off gaming week at the KIDO Family Ranch, as the hosts explore Minecraft, combining creativity, survival challenges, and lessons from the kids.

item.title: Audiobook | Unschool Discoveries : Venturing into the Unknown
item.description:
Immerse yourself in the audiobook edition of 'Unschool Discoveries: Venturing into the Unknown,' a journey that redefines learning and adventure. Follow the captivating experiences of our unschooled protagonists as they explore the world around them, learning from every encounter and challenge. This story isn't just about discovery; it's about seeing the world through eyes unbound by conventional learning, where every moment is a lesson and every experience, a treasure. Tune in for a narrative that celebrates curiosity, freedom, and the joy of learning in the most unexpected ways!
Grab a signed copy of our book: "Unschool Discoveries: Venturing into the Unknown" by Danii Oliver https://kidofamilyranchpublishing.square.site/
Subscribe to Unschool Pages of Our Lives on Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/Unschool-Pages-of-Our-Lives/dp/B0CH1PMTCX
Subscribe to Unschool Pages of Our Lives on Apple Podcast, Youtube Music, Youtube Podcast, Podbean and anywhere you listen to podcasts.
Parent Newsletter: https://substack.com/@unschoolpages
Explorer Club: patreon.com/daniioliver
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: This audiobook invites listeners to follow unschooled characters on a journey of discovery, curiosity, and learning beyond conventional education, celebrating freedom and the joy of exploration.

item.title: Marsupial Mania: From Boodies to Tree Kangaroos
item.description: Dive deep into the captivating world of marsupials in this enlightening episode! Discover the wonders of boodies, joeys, and the mesmerizing tree kangaroos. We read and learn about animal self-defense, momma kangaroos unschooling her joey and the charming quirks of Koalas. We unveil the mysteries of finding water in warm solids, sugar gliders and not mice, mice looking marsupials. And if you've got a termite problem, stick around to find out which marsupial might just become your best friend. Join us for a marsupial-filled adventure that promises knowledge and fun!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: This episode explores the fascinating world of marsupials, from boodies and tree kangaroos to sugar gliders and koalas, uncovering their behaviors, survival skills, and quirky traits in a fun and educational adventure.

item.title: Exploring Our Environment: Unschooling Adventures
item.description:
Home From School? Dive into a whirlwind of learning with our unschoolers in this episode! From dinosaurs to the F-16 and Concorde planes, we cover a lot. We explore the fascinating eating habits of snakes, delve into how the vision impaired navigate the world, and observe the changing seasons. Even Dr. Super Mom is on a quest for knowledge too, seeking books on research, design, and people management. Plus, it's reading day, and all our storybooks are about learning what's in your Environment, the first of the 5 Ease Methodology. This episode is a whirlwind journey answering the ever-present question: “What is this?” in the most exciting ways.
Grab your copy of our book “Unschool Discoveries: Venturing into the Unknown” to learn more about how to have your own unschool learning adventures. Visit https://unschooldiscoveries.com
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: This episode follows a lively day of unschool learning, exploring topics from dinosaurs and fighter jets to snake habits, visual impairment, seasonal changes, and the power of environment in shaping curiosity and discovery.

item.title: Bruno Revisited: Embracing Mental Health and Imperfection Part 2
item.description: Back with “Let's Talk About Bruno: Part 2,” we dive deeper into the world of mental health support and the power of hugs. This episode explores the pitfalls of perfection, how to sidestep burnout and depression, and why prickly problems sometimes need a gentle touch. We're unraveling the complex layers of our brains and the beauty of embracing imperfection. Join us for a journey into understanding, empathy, and the importance of being kind to ourselves and others.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: In Part 2, the episode explores mental health support, the dangers of perfectionism and burnout, and the importance of empathy, self-compassion, and embracing imperfection.

item.title: Let's Talk About Bruno: Understanding Emotions and EQ: Part 1
item.description: In this episode on navigating complex emotions and their impact on children, we explore how openness and emotional intelligence can help in coping with life's challenges. This discussion offers insights, conversation starters, and practical tools focused on EQ (Emotional Intelligence) and understanding feelings like depression and anxiety. We also explore joy with Dino Robot and share our take on films that touch on these themes, including Inside Out and Encanto. Join us for an honest and supportive conversation about mental health, emotional well-being, and the importance of embracing our feelings with empathy and understanding. For additional resources, visit our newsletter and blog. Unschool Pages Hub: https://unschoolpages.unschooldiscoveries.com

item.title: Wild Cats and Mythical Tales: A Feline Adventure
item.description: Explore the realm of wild cats, panthers, jaguars, leopards - where do they live? What's the difference? Dive into the world of saber tooth tigers aka Smilodons, LIGERS, TIGONS, and ‘Poo-bears', OH MY! In this episode of 'Unschool Pages of Our Lives,' we also unravel the story of the Thunder Cats and the goddesses Sekhmet and Bastet. It's a captivating blend of wild cat facts, fiction, and lore. Join us for this feline-filled journey!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Explore the realm of wild cats, panthers, jaguars, leopards - where do they live? What's the difference? Dive into the world of saber tooth tigers aka Smilodons, LIGERS, TIGONS, and ‘Poo-bears', OH MY! In this episode of 'Unschool Pages of Our Lives,' we also unravel the story of the Thunder Cats and the goddesses Sekhmet and Bastet. It's a captivating blend of wild cat facts, fiction, and lore. Join us for this feline-filled journey!

item.title: Pet Drama Tales
item.description:
Unschool Friends today we Dive into our long awaited pet universe episode “Pet Drama Tales". We discuss who makes great pets, how FISH are high-maintenance paintings that swim. Wanting PIGS but NOT turning them into pepperoni. We countdown our RABBIT tales from five to until there was one and reminisce about the four DOGS that graced and then left the Unschool Pages of Our Lives. Plus, get the scoop on the annoying CAT that adopted us, after being abandoned by our new neighbors. It's a wild, furry ride of “Pet Drama Tales, It's Only the Beginning”. Welcome to part 1!

Grab your copy of "Unschool Discoveries" Book 1: https://unschooldiscoveries.com

Our Unschool Parents Support Newsletter is now available: https://bit.ly/unschoolpageshub
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary:
Unschool Friends today we Dive into our long awaited pet universe episode “Pet Drama Tales - It's Only the Beginning”. In Part 1 We discuss who makes great pets, how FISH are high-maintenance paintings that swim. Wanting PIGS but NOT turning them into pepperoni. We countdown our RABBIT tales from five to until there was one and reminisce about the four DOGS that graced and then left the Unschool Pages of Our Lives. Plus, get the scoop on the annoying CAT that adopted us, after being abandoned by our new neighbors. It's a wild, furry ride of “Pet Drama Tales, It's Only the Beginning”. Welcome to part 1!

Grab your copy of "Unschool Discoveries" Book 1: https://unschooldiscoveries.com

Our Unschool Parents Support Newsletter is now available: https://bit.ly/unschoolpageshub

item.title: Exploring Mom and Dad's Creativity.
item.description: Today, we take a look at the creativity of our Mom and Dad. Mommy's been writing, illustrating, and designing books. Daddy's been perfecting Caribbean recipes that are healthy and yummy for a book ans his cooking show. Have a listen and tell us what you think 🤔. What are your moms and dads making and building?
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Today, we take a look at the creativity of our Mom and Dad. Mommy's been writing, illustrating, and designing books. Daddy's been perfecting Caribbean recipes that are healthy and yummy for a book ans his cooking show. Have a listen and tell us what you think 🤔. What are your moms and dads making and building?

item.title: We're Sick
item.description: All about being sick.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: All about being sick.

item.title: Halloween Day: Getting Ready Part 2
item.description: Get set for Part 2 of our Halloween fun! We've got more tales where spooky creatures become friendly pals. Listen in as our host shares the best tips for gathering the yummiest candies and talks about their favorite treats! And remember, waiting for Halloween 🎃 can be tough, but oh-so worth it for the sweet rewards!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Get set for Part 2 of our Halloween fun! We've got more tales where spooky creatures become friendly pals. Listen in as our host shares the best tips for gathering the yummiest candies and talks about their favorite treats! And remember, waiting for Halloween 🎃 can be tough, but oh-so worth it for the sweet rewards!

item.title: Imogeemo Reimagined: A Modern Twist on Trinidadian Lore
item.description: Dive into a captivating episode as we breathe new life into 'Imogeemo,' a cherished Trinidadian folklore. Journey with us through a tale that weaves the mystical threads of the past into the vibrant fabric of the present. In this unique story, familiar enchantments meet contemporary twists, captivating listeners with a blend of tradition and modern-day intrigue. Join us for an unforgettable adventure that bridges generations, celebrating the timeless magic of Caribbean storytelling.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Dive into a captivating episode as we breathe new life into 'Imogeemo,' a cherished Trinidadian folklore. Journey with us through a tale that weaves the mystical threads of the past into the vibrant fabric of the present. In this unique story, familiar enchantments meet contemporary twists, captivating listeners with a blend of tradition and modern-day intrigue. Join us for an unforgettable adventure that bridges generations, celebrating the timeless magic of Caribbean storytelling.

item.title: Halloween Crafting: A Cosplay Adventure
item.description: Join us in this thrilling episode where imagination, artistry, and engineering collide in the realm of costume creation! As we dive into our ambitious plans for iconic characters like Poison Ivy, glitched-out Corrupted Sims, Darth Vader, and the enigmatic Darth Daddyous, each step becomes a lesson in creativity and resourcefulness. Journey through discussions on crafting the perfect plumbob, strategizing Darth Vader's cape dynamics, and the existential costume crisis of Darth Daddyous. Does he opt for a frightening glowing mask or character makeup? Or will he immerse himself in the lore as a unique Sith Lord? The adventure doesn't stop there; we're also looking back at our DIY hall of fame featuring Baby Batman and her parents Harley Quinn & The Joker Miss Frizzle & Curious George and the time Darth Daddyous was Clark Kent, no no superman just geeky Clark Kent, and more! Plus When the realization hits that we're out of batteries, it's all hands on deck to innovate a solution for our Sim's shining plumbob. This episode is more than a costume-making saga; it's a testament to the unschooling spirit. We're not just making outfits; we're engineering dreams, designing realities, and sewing the very fabric of our imagination. Get ready for a tale of exact-o knives, hot glue, grit, and glitter! Wait what? There's no glitter, please no glitter! Grab a copy of our debut Unschooling storybook "Unschool Discoveries: Venturing into the Unknown" Now Available on Amazon bit.ly/unschoolbook Learn more about real world Unschooling on our Unschool Pages Hub bit.ly/unschoolpageshub
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary:
Join us in this thrilling episode where imagination, artistry, and engineering collide in the realm of costume creation! As we dive into our ambitious plans for iconic characters like Poison Ivy, glitched-out Corrupted Sims, Darth Vader, and the enigmatic Darth Daddyous, each step becomes a lesson in creativity and resourcefulness.

Journey through discussions on crafting the perfect plumbob, strategizing Darth Vader's cape dynamics, and the existential costume crisis of Darth Daddyous. Does he opt for a frightening glowing mask or character makeup? Or will he immerse himself in the lore as a unique Sith Lord? The adventure doesn't stop there; we're also looking back at our DIY hall of fame featuring Baby Batman and her parents Harley Quinn & The Joker Miss Frizzle & Curious George and the time Darth Daddyous was Clark Kent, no no superman just geeky Clark Kent, and more!

Plus When the realization hits that we're out of batteries, it's all hands on deck to innovate a solution for our Sim's shining plumbob. This episode is more than a costume-making saga; it's a testament to the unschooling spirit. We're not just making outfits; we're engineering dreams, designing realities, and sewing the very fabric of our imagination. Get ready for a tale of exact-o knives, hot glue, grit, and glitter!


Wait what? There's no glitter, please no glitter!


Grab a copy of our debut Unschooling storybook "Unschool Discoveries: Venturing into the Unknown" Now Available on Amazon bit.ly/unschoolbook


Learn more about real world Unschooling on our Unschool Pages Hub bit.ly/unschoolpageshub

item.title: Real Zombie Facts Uncovered: Nature's Undead
item.description: Join us on a spine-chilling journey into the eerie world of nature's very own zombies. Delve into how certain fungi astonishingly take control of bodies, leading to hair-raising facts about body-snatched ant zombies. As we navigate through complex scientific names and marvel at alarming head eruptions, Dino Robot devises a playful plot to use fungi on their mom. This throwback episode not only introduces us to the undead wonders of nature but also serves as a testament to the remarkable growth of our unschoolers. Dive into these uncanny facts and marvel at the transformative power of unschooling.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Join us on a spine-chilling journey into the eerie world of nature's very own zombies. Delve into how certain fungi astonishingly take control of bodies, leading to hair-raising facts about body-snatched ant zombies. As we navigate through complex scientific names and marvel at alarming head eruptions, Dino Robot devises a playful plot to use fungi on their mom. This throwback episode not only introduces us to the undead wonders of nature but also serves as a testament to the remarkable growth of our unschoolers. Dive into these uncanny facts and marvel at the transformative power of unschooling.

item.title: Rainy Day Protocol with Dino Robot, the Paleontologist
item.description: Missed the rain in Texas? Us too! We're creating our own rainy day vibe for pure play and movie magic. Dive into an Arawak rain dance, then level up in economic strategy with dino video games. Experience a special day as Dr. Super Mom and Dinosaur Robot of All Dinosaurs bond over shared passions, tackling game challenges, stress management, and budgeting basics. Stay tuned—Miss Animalia brings some dino research to the mix! Join us for a day filled with bonding, learning, and wishes for rain.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Missed the rain in Texas? Us too! We're creating our own rainy day vibe for pure play and movie magic. Dive into an Arawak rain dance, then level up in economic strategy with dino video games. Experience a special day as Dr. Super Mom and Dinosaur Robot of All Dinosaurs bond over shared passions, tackling game challenges, stress management, and budgeting basics. Stay tuned—Miss Animalia brings some dino research to the mix! Join us for a day filled with bonding, learning, and wishes for rain.

item.title: Unschoolers Transitioning: From Teens to Empowered Adults
item.description: Unschoolers becoming ADULTS? Scary! Not at all. In this insightful episode, we dive deep into a teen's transition to adulthood. The path is layered, from establishing firm boundaries and speaking assertively with older adults, to managing family dynamics and avoiding the pitfalls of misplaced responsibility. As our young unschooler sets up for future success, they navigate the challenges of independence, all while imparting lessons to the adults who cherish them. This isn't just an episode—it's a sneak peek into our exclusive bonus content. Especially tailored for the teen and adult unschoolers, join us for a candid look at growing up unschooled.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary:
Unschoolers becoming ADULTS? Scary! Not at all.

In this insightful episode, we dive deep into a teen's transition to adulthood. The path is layered, from establishing firm boundaries and speaking assertively with older adults, to managing family dynamics and avoiding the pitfalls of misplaced responsibility. As our young unschooler sets up for future success, they navigate the challenges of independence, all while imparting lessons to the adults who cherish them. This isn't just an episode—it's a sneak peek into our exclusive bonus content. Especially tailored for the teen and adult unschoolers, join us for a candid look at growing up unschooled.

item.title: Unschoolers' Day Out: Nature Trails, Lakeside Gazing & Big Sister Chronicles
item.description: Join us on a refreshing unschooling adventure as we trek nature trails, marvel at deer by the lake, and embrace the pure joy of 'doing nothing'. Dive into the dynamics of big sister wisdom and experience a day packed with natural learning, exploration, and bonding. If you're curious about the unschooling approach or just love tales of outdoor escapades, this episode is a must-listen. Dive in and get inspired to explore the great outdoors with your family. Unschooling, Nature Trails, Lakeside, Big Sister, Deer Watching, Outdoor Adventures, Family Bonding, Natural Learning, Exploration.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Join us on a refreshing unschooling adventure as we trek nature trails, marvel at deer by the lake, and embrace the pure joy of 'doing nothing'. Dive into the dynamics of big sister wisdom and experience a day packed with natural learning, exploration, and bonding. If you're curious about the unschooling approach or just love tales of outdoor escapades, this episode is a must-listen. Dive in and get inspired to explore the great outdoors with your family. Unschooling, Nature Trails, Lakeside, Big Sister, Deer Watching, Outdoor Adventures, Family Bonding, Natural Learning, Exploration.

item.title: Storytime: Exclusive Free Audiobook - Unschool Discoveries: Venturing Into The Unknown by Danii Oliver
item.description: Bonus Time Episode: Dive deep into the vibrant world of unschooling with this exclusive free audiobook episode! Journey alongside curious explorers as they embark on a quest of self-directed learning, unraveling the mysteries and wonders of the world around them. Authored by the talented Danii Oliver, "Unschool Discoveries: Venturing Into The Unknown" paints a vivid picture of the magic and challenges that come with forging one's own educational path. This special release is a testament to the beauty of curiosity, the thrill of discovery, and the boundless possibilities that unschooling offers. Immerse yourself in this captivating narrative and let the adventure unfold!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Limited Time Episode: Dive deep into the vibrant world of unschooling with this exclusive free audiobook episode! Journey alongside curious explorers as they embark on a quest of self-directed learning, unraveling the mysteries and wonders of the world around them. Authored by the talented Danii Oliver, "Unschool Discoveries: Venturing Into The Unknown" paints a vivid picture of the magic and challenges that come with forging one's own educational path. This special release is a testament to the beauty of curiosity, the thrill of discovery, and the boundless possibilities that unschooling offers. Immerse yourself in this captivating narrative and let the adventure unfold!

item.title: Astronomy to Zoology Our New Active Learning Season
item.description: Join Miss Animalia and Dinosaur Robot of All Dinosaurs as they embark on a reflective journey, reminiscing about the year that was and charting a path for the year ahead. This episode offers a profound look into the evolving world of unschooling, where interests are pursued passionately and curiosities are satiated with active engagement.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Join Miss Animalia and Dinosaur Robot of All Dinosaurs as they embark on a reflective journey, reminiscing about the year that was and charting a path for the year ahead. This episode offers a profound look into the evolving world of unschooling, where interests are pursued passionately and curiosities are satiated with active engagement.

item.title: Anniversary Special: A Year of Storytime Magic & Unschool Discoveries!
item.description: Celebrate with us as 'Unschool Pages of Our Lives' turns ONE! Dive into this special anniversary episode where we revisit our top 3 listener favorites: 'The Littlest Yak', 'Scaredy Squirrel at the Beach', and 'Bubbles Up'. But that's not all! We're also thrilled to share our very own stories from the 'Unschool Discoveries' series, penned by Dr. Super Mom aka Danii Oliver. Join us for 'Venturing Into The Unknown', 'The Enchanted Tent: Travels Through England', and our latest, 'Expansive Growth'. It's a blend of beloved tales and fresh narratives as we celebrate a year of unschooling journeys and tales! #AnniversarySpecial #UnschoolDiscoveries
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Celebrate with us as 'Unschool Pages of Our Lives' turns ONE! Dive into this special anniversary episode where we revisit our top 3 listener favorites: 'The Littlest Yak', 'Scaredy Squirrel at the Beach', and 'Bubbles Up'. But that's not all! We're also thrilled to share our very own stories from the 'Unschool Discoveries' series, penned by Dr. Super Mom aka Danii Oliver. Join us for 'Venturing Into The Unknown', 'The Enchanted Tent: Travels Through England', and our latest, 'Expansive Growth'. It's a blend of beloved tales and fresh narratives as we celebrate a year of unschooling journeys and tales! #AnniversarySpecial #UnschoolDiscoveries

item.title: Unschoolers Ask Experts Questions: Grandma's Trinidadian Doubles Interview
item.description: Dive into the flavorful world of Trinidadian cuisine as Miss Animalia gets the inside scoop on making authentic Doubles! In this delightful episode, our young host chats with her grandmother, unearthing family secrets behind the perfect bara and curry channa. Discover the rich heritage, passion, and traditions encapsulated in every bite of this beloved Trinidadian street food. Perfect for food lovers and culture enthusiasts, tune in and savor the tales from our family kitchen to your ears. Trinidadian Doubles, Authentic Doubles Recipe, Grandma's Kitchen, Trinidadian Cuisine, Miss Animalia, Bara Recipe, Curry Channa, Traditional Cooking, Family Secrets, Street Food Stories.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Dive into the flavorful world of Trinidadian cuisine as Miss Animalia gets the inside scoop on making authentic Doubles! In this delightful episode, our young host chats with her grandmother, unearthing family secrets behind the perfect bara and curry channa. Discover the rich heritage, passion, and traditions encapsulated in every bite of this beloved Trinidadian street food. Perfect for food lovers and culture enthusiasts, tune in and savor the tales from our family kitchen to your ears.Trinidadian Doubles, Authentic Doubles Recipe, Grandma's Kitchen, Trinidadian Cuisine, Miss Animalia, Bara Recipe, Curry Channa, Traditional Cooking, Family Secrets, Street Food Stories.

item.title: British Blunders: The Hilarious, Uncut England Interview – Bonus Episode
item.description: British Blunders: The Hilarious, Uncut England Interview – Bonus Episode! Get ready for a rollercoaster of laughter as we unveil the unfiltered, behind-the-scenes blooper reel from our England interview. Experience all the delightful hiccups, unexpected moments, and candid hilarity in this special bonus episode. It's a fun-filled journey through our unscripted discussions about England. Grab your headphones, and prepare for some unfiltered unschooling fun!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: British Blunders: The Hilarious, Uncut England Interview – Bonus Episode! Get ready for a rollercoaster of laughter as we unveil the unfiltered, behind-the-scenes blooper reel from our England interview. Experience all the delightful hiccups, unexpected moments, and candid hilarity in this special bonus episode. It's a fun-filled journey through our unscripted discussions about England. Grab your headphones, and prepare for some unfiltered unschooling fun!

item.title: Unschoolers Ask Experts Questions: England Travel Interview
item.description: Unschoolers Grill the Gurus: England Travel Deep Dive!Description: The much-anticipated series, "Unschoolers Ask Experts Questions", kicks off with a bang! Journey with us to the heart of England as we dig deep, ask the tough questions, and explore all the travel secrets from the experts. Whether you're a travel enthusiast or just curious about England, this episode promises a wealth of knowledge, fun facts, and unschooled curiosity. Tune in and let the adventure begin!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Unschoolers Grill the Gurus: England Travel Deep Dive!"</strongDescription: The much-anticipated series, "Unschoolers Ask Experts Questions", kicks off with a bang! Journey with us to the heart of England as we dig deep, ask the tough questions, and explore all the travel secrets from the experts. Whether you're a travel enthusiast or just curious about England, this episode promises a wealth of knowledge, fun facts, and unschooled curiosity. Tune in and let the adventure begin!

item.title: England Travel Studies
item.description: When daddy has to travel away, we study where he goes until we can travel with him as worldschoolers. This stop, England, a country in the UK made up of islands off the west coast of Europe.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: When daddy has to travel away, we study where he goes until we can travel with him as worldschoolers. This stop, England, a country in the UK made up of islands off the west coast of Europe.

item.title: Just Kinda Thinking About Life
item.description: <>In today's episode, join us on a super cool adventure about growing up! Listen to Miss Animalia talk about her thoughts, dive deep into the exciting world of video games, and learn some fun Spanish words with us. Plus, find out what's yummy in Vegan & Oovo Vegan dishes. And guess what? We're sharing a special story from our "Unschool Discoveries" series called "Expansive Growth." It's all about the fun journeys of Danielle and David. This isn't the first story, but it's the very first one we're showing you! So, jump into the story, let your imagination play, and remember to tell us what you think in the comments! Ready, set, explore and enjoy!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: In today's episode, join us on a super cool adventure about growing up! Listen to Miss Animalia talk about her thoughts, dive deep into the exciting world of video games, and learn some fun Spanish words with us. Plus, find out what's yummy in Vegan & Oovo Vegan dishes. And guess what? We're sharing a special story from our "Unschool Discoveries" series called "Expansive Growth." It's all about the fun journeys of Danielle and David. This isn't the first story, but it's the very first one we're showing you! So, jump into the story, let your imagination play, and remember to tell us what you think in the comments! Ready, set, explore and enjoy! 🚀📚🎮🍴

item.title: Telling our own stories.
item.description: Part one of many attempts to create our own stories. We're getting the ideas out of our heads so we can assess and edit while ginding our own voice.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Part one of many attempts to create our own stories. We're getting the ideas out of our heads so we can assess and edit while ginding our own voice.

item.title: Summer Vacation
item.description: In this episode, we discuss our summer vacation adventures and read stories about others' vacations. Also we learn about ocean population and the importance of keeping our oceans clean and all life safe.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: In this episode, we discuss our summer vacation adventures and read stories about others' vacations. Also we learn about ocean population and the importance of keeping our oceans clean and all life safe.

item.title: The Butterfly 🦋 Day Episode
item.description: We were lost in a swarm of butterflies. Mesmerized by their beauty, we dropped everything to investigate and learn more. Now we share our story with you.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: We were lost in a swarm of butterflies. Mesmerized by their beauty, we dropped everything to investigate and learn more. Now we share our story with you.

item.title: Warm Up Bloopers
item.description: Nonsense Kid Chatter Bloppers
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Nonsense Kid Chatter Bloppers

item.title: The Episode All About Eating
item.description: We discuss eating, read about reading, share facts about eating and bonuses, and learn about what our food does when we aren't eating it. Join us for an episode like none we've done before that you'll really want to MUNCH on!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: We discuss eating, read about reading, share facts about eating and bonuses, and learn about what our food does when we aren't eating it. Join us for an episode like none we've done before that you'll really want to MUNCH on!

item.title: Dinosaur Chat
item.description: We're chatting about Dinosaurs. One of the most fascinating topics in our Unschooled Lives are the topics of the unknown that border very close to the lines of Science Fiction and Science Fact. We are scientists at the end of the day so exploring the unknown, little known and soon to be known is what we do best. Discussion lead by our 4 year old producer Dino Robot.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: We're chatting about Dinosaurs. One of the most fascinating topics in our Unschooled Lives are the topics of the unknown that border very close to the lines of Science Fiction and Science Fact. We are scientists at the end of the day so exploring the unknown, little known and soon to be known is what we do best. Discussion lead by our 4 year old producer Dino Robot.

item.title: Ep 21. S2: Movies with Stories We Respect
item.description: Representation matters even if it is 21 years in the making.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Representation matters even if it is 21 years in the making.

item.title: Season 2 Trailer
item.description: It's late, we know, but who cares?! We're unschoolers living wild and free. For us, time doesn't matter beyond waking up with the sun to explore each new day with jubilation! It's a short one, easy to digest and share with anyone you think might be interested in the Unschooling or Homeaschooling lifestyle.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: It's late, we know, but who cares?! We're unschoolers living wild and free. For us, time doesn't matter beyond waking up with the sun to explore each new day with jubilation! It's a short one, easy to digest and share with anyone you think might be interested in the Unschooling or Homeaschooling lifestyle.

item.title: Ep 20. S2: The Hair Episode
item.description: Oliver has become our official podcast producer. At the age of 4, they might just be the youngest podcast producer and cinematographer. Future episodes will be themed or by topic since Oliver is making a list for us and checking it twice. Join us today for a discussion about Human hair and that of other mammals.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Oliver has become our official podcast producer. At the age of 4, they might just be the youngest podcast producer and cinematographer. Future episodes will be themed or by topic since Oliver is making a list for us and checking it twice. Join us today for a discussion about Human hair and that of other mammals.

item.title: Ep. 19 S2: Oliver's Lonely Story
item.description: Beware this is a look into the storytelling mind of a 4 year old unschooler.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Beware this is a look into the storytelling mind of a 4 year old unschooler.

item.title: Ep 18. S2: Oliver's Food Episode
item.description: Daddy cooked delicious food and I want to share our love of fresh homemade food with you. It takes so long to cook might as well make it a thing.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Daddy cooked delicious food and I want to share our love of fresh homemade food with you. It takes so long to cook might as well make it a thing.

item.title: Ep 17. S2: The Sims 4
item.description: Ana-Imalia talks to us about all theirThe Sims 4 knowledge, new 2023 updates and easter eggs in the game.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Ana-Imalia talks to us about all theirThe Sims 4 knowledge, new 2023 updates and easter eggs in the game.

item.title: Ep 16. S2: Space Station Bedroom
item.description: In this episode we discuss our Space Station bedroom mural that Dr. Supermom is painting but get distracted by the construction and end up prematurely blasting off before the ship is ready to leave earth. Oh No! Find out what happens.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: In this episode we discuss our Space Station bedroom mural that Dr. Supermom is painting but get distracted by the construction and end up prematurely blasting off before the ship is ready to leave earth. Oh No! Find out what happens.

item.title: Typical Unschool Conversations
item.description: Wondering about what a day might look like or sound like for unschoolers? Now's your chance to listen in.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: We hope.

item.title: Ep 13. Season 2: Art
item.description: Yes, there's a little artist in us all. And we quickly learn that artists can be both creative and destructive.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Yes, there's a little artist in us all. And we quickly learn that artists can be both creative and destructive.

item.title: Ep 12. S2: Pokémon Are We
item.description: What if we were Pokémon?
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: What if we were Pokémon?

item.title: Exposure: Oceans to the Arctic the Climate outside Our Home
item.description: When We've learned all that's in our environment and something captures our attention, it's time for Exposure. Not stopping where the front door ends but rather opening the front door as the starting point of Exposure to all the world has to offer. One of the most elusive (define for a child) parts of earth is the ocean and the frozen north and rapid climate change being witnessed and recorded in real-time. In this episode we learn more about the about the the environment outside our homes through Exposure to polar bears,
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: When We've learned all that's in our environment and something captures our attention, it's time for Exposure. One of the most elusive (define for a child) parts of earth is the ocean and the frozen north and rapid climate change being witnessed and recorded in real-time. In this episode we learn more about the about the the environment outside our homes through Exposure to polar bears,

item.title: Ep 10. Season 2: Popcorn Philosophy
item.description: The popcorn podcast where we eat popcorn and pop around subject matter is it relates to history, war, concurring people, the development of empathy, relationship, friendship, and family.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: The popcorn podcast where we eat popcorn and pop around subject matter is it relates to history, war, concurring people, the development of empathy, relationship, friendship, and family.

item.title: Ep. 9 Season 2: Dreams Over Ice Cream
item.description: We learned something interesting about our dreams and are sharing with each other.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: We learned something interesting about our dreams and are sharing with each other.

item.title: Ep. 5 Season 2: Rainy Day Protocol
item.description: All that our Rainy Day Protocol 🌧🌩⛈️ entails and so much more. Chat 📻 radio.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: All that our Rainy Day Protocol 🌧🌩⛈️ entails and so much more. Chat 📻 radio.

item.title: Ep. 2 Season 2: Q&A Time
item.description: Planet Earth, we got QUESTIONS!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Planet Earth, we got QUESTIONS!

item.title: Ep 1. S2: Legos and Questions
item.description: Lego projects we have going and some crazy toddler questions.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Lego projects we have going and some crazy toddler questions.

item.title: Unschool Unscripted: A Day in the Life
item.description:
Step into the vibrant world of unschooling with 'Unschool Unscripted: A Day in the Life.' From the candid chatter of talk radio to the imaginative realms of playtime, this episode offers a glimpse into the daily dynamics of self-directed learning. Hear firsthand the thoughts, ideas, questions, and stories that bubble up when kids lead their education. It's a slice-of-life showcase, revealing the unfiltered, creative, and exploratory spirit of the unschooling journey. Tune in for an authentic audio snapshot of learning unleashed!
A slice-of-life moment with children engaged in self-directed learning and play. This episode is a natural and spontaneous exploration of everyday curiosities, highlighting the unschooling experience where the environment itself becomes a playful classroom. The discussions range from making connections with pop culture references like cartoon characters to practical life skills such as dishwashing and sewing, all wrapped in a narrative of imaginative play and sibling interaction.Given the organic and multifaceted nature this candid episode encapsulates the essence of unschooling, while showcasing playful and varied topics. The themes that emerge are from the unschooled children's interactions and the learning moments they experience.
Send in a voice message: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/unschoolpagesofourlives/message
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Step into the vibrant world of unschooling with 'Unschool Unscripted: A Day in the Life.' From the candid chatter of talk radio to the imaginative realms of playtime, this episode offers a glimpse into the daily dynamics of self-directed learning. Hear firsthand the thoughts, ideas, questions, and stories that bubble up when kids lead their education. It's a slice-of-life showcase, revealing the unfiltered, creative, and exploratory spirit of the unschooling journey. Tune in for an authentic audio snapshot of learning unleashed! A slice-of-life moment with children engaged in self-directed learning and play. This episode is a natural and spontaneous exploration of everyday curiosities, highlighting the unschooling experience where the environment itself becomes a playful classroom. The discussions range from making connections with pop culture references like cartoon characters to practical life skills such as dishwashing and sewing, all wrapped in a narrative of imaginative play and sibling interaction.Given the organic and multifaceted nature this candid episode encapsulates the essence of unschooling, while showcasing playful and varied topics. The themes that emerge are from the unschooled children's interactions and the learning moments they experience.

item.title: D&D Exploration Part 2
item.description: Today, we begin the journey of exploring the Dungeons and Dragon game. A tabletop RPG based on storytelling, imagination, and connectivity. Anything to get us to connect offline is time well spent. Join our gameplay and an active story listener.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Today, we begin the journey of exploring the Dungeons and Dragon game. A tabletop RPG based on storytelling, imagination, and connectivity. Anything to get us to connect offline is time well spent. Join our gameplay and an active story listener.

item.title: Superpower Interview
item.description: Meet Mega Dinosaur, Animelia and Super Dr. Mom.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Meet Mega Dinosaur, Animelia and Super Dr. Mom.

item.title: Let's Make Music
item.description: No clue what mom is doing but, she's trying to help. Ivy demonstrates all the chords and together we make stories and songs.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: No clue what mom is doing but, she's trying to help. Ivy demonstrates all the chords and together we make stories and songs.

item.title: Let's Talk about Stygimolchs
item.description: Mommy no more outerspace lets look at Stygimolochs now.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Mommy no more outerspace lets look at Stygimolochs now.

item.title: Space Talk
item.description: Look in the sky mommy I saw a rocket ship!
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Look in the sky mommy I saw a rocket ship!

item.title: User Research
item.description: Mom's heading back to work and it's time to do some digging. We've got a great pool of users to talk to and ask for insights.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Mom's heading back to work and it's time to do some digging. We've got a great pool of users to talk to and ask for insights.

item.title: Making Things and Chatting
item.description: In this episode we discuss making and building things. It's a quick chat about how much faster we can get what we want and need when we make it ourselves.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: In this episode we discuss making and building things. It's a quick chat about how much faster we can get what we want and need when we make it ourselves.

item.title: Superpowers
item.description: We all have them. What are your superpowers and how do you express them? We invite you and your children to participate in the conversation by leaving a recorded message about your superpowers to be added to the show.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: We all have them. What are your superpowers and how do you express them? We invite you and your children to participate in the conversation by leaving a recorded message about your superpowers to be added to the show.

item.title: Monster Truck Line Up
item.description: Who's in the line up? Who's in top shape? And who will make the cut for the big show day?
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Who's in the line up? Who's in top shape? And who will make the cut for the big show day?

item.title: What Minecraft Luck!
item.description: Today Ivy got the luck of a motha load in Minecraft and they discuss the entire discovery.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Today Ivy got the luck of a motha load in Minecraft and they discuss the entire discovery.

item.title: Monster Truck Delight
item.description: In this episode we dive into the details of co-host Oliver's Monster Truck Collection. Not all the trucks are in the show only a few arrive for this chat. Oh and there's a special surprise guest too. Stay tuned for more daily conversations.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: In this episode we dive into the details of co-host Oliver's Monster Truck Collection. Not all the trucks are in the show only a few arrive for this chat. Oh and there's a special surprise guest too. Stay tuned for more daily conversations.

item.title: Unschooling with purpose 1st day Fall 2022
item.description: Unschooling with purpose 1st day Fall 2022
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Unschooling with purpose 1st day Fall 2022

item.title: 1001 Things to See at the Sea
item.description: There's so much to see at the sea, the ocean that is. Whether swimming, diving or sailing we explore what all there is to see.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: There's so much to see at the sea, the ocean that is. Whether swimming, diving or sailing we explore what all there is to see.

item.title: Music and Balloons
item.description: The beginning of fun times and learning. More chatting for now.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: The beginning of fun times and learning. More chatting for now.

item.title: Working out our Talk Radio format
item.description: Working out our Talk Radio format. Adults talk crap at rising and people listen so we're talking crap and having a laugh at the same time. Good Rising all.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Working out our Talk Radio format. Adults talk crap at rising and people listen so we're talking crap and having a laugh at the same time. Good Rising all.

item.title: Same old...Not!
item.description: It's always the same but never the same way. Life is repetition. Life is exploration. Life is reflection and in such we discover. Unschoolers Discover It's just what we do.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: It's always the same but never the same way. Life is repetition. Life is exploration. Life is reflection and in such we discover. Unschoolers Discover It's just what we do.

item.title: Unschoolers Rising Conversations
item.description: Another day another rising to discuss, ideate and create.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Another day another rising to discuss, ideate and create.

item.title: An unschooling unorganized conversation.
item.description: Arguments, discussions, phone calls etc.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Arguments, discussions, phone calls etc.

item.title: Unschooling Unveiled: A Day in Our Life
item.description: Ever wondered about the unschooling lifestyle? Dive in with us as we pull back the curtain on a typical day, sharing the adventures, explorations, and unique learning moments that shape our journey. Discover the freedom, creativity, and boundless curiosity that unschooling offers.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Ever wondered about the unschooling lifestyle? Dive in with us as we pull back the curtain on a typical day, sharing the adventures, explorations, and unique learning moments that shape our journey. Discover the freedom, creativity, and boundless curiosity that unschooling offers.

item.title: Sounds of Unschoolers chatting, reading, and learning.
item.description: Living is learning, and we learn by living. That's it. No school, no classes, no homework, and no tests. We are unschoolers living to explore all that life on earth is.
item.dc:creator: Unschool Pages of Our Lives, Danii Oliver
item.itunes:summary: Living is learning, and we learn by living. That's it. No school, no classes, no homework, and no tests. We are unschoolers living to explore all that life on earth is.
